title: No rate limiting on /jmap, /api/send, /api/wallet/pay
description: daemon/src/main.rs registers /jmap POST, /api/send, /api/wallet/pay with no rate limiting middleware. A local script (even one that passes the Bearer token) can exhaust the relay tx channel or SQLite connection pool with a tight loop. This is a local daemon, but the token is stored in a file that any process running as the user can read. Without rate limiting, a rogue process or loop can DoS the relay connection or fill the jmap.db. Expected: tower_http RateLimitLayer or per-route limits.
